'''bangala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qishlaq|qishlaq]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-ng-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qishlaq|qishlaq]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| bangala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bængælæth|bængælæth]] || [[word:bængælæj|bængælæj]] || [[word:bængælæsh|bængælæsh]] || [[word:bængælæ|bængælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bangangalath|bangangalath]] || [[word:bangangalaj|bangangalaj]] || [[word:bangangalash|bangangalash]] || [[word:bangangala|bangangala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bangalath|bangalath]] || [[word:bangalaj|bangalaj]] || [[word:bangalash|bangalash]] || [[word:bangala|bangala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bangaflath|bangaflath]] || [[word:bangaflaj|bangaflaj]] || [[word:bangaflash|bangaflash]] || [[word:bangaflaf|bangaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bangalatha|bangalatha]] || [[word:bangalaja|bangalaja]] || [[word:bangalasha|bangalasha]] || [[word:bangalaka|bangalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bangalath|bangalath]] || [[word:bangalaj|bangalaj]] || [[word:bangalash|bangalash]] || [[word:bangala|bangala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bangalathal|bangalathal]] || [[word:bangalajal|bangalajal]] || [[word:bangalashal|bangalashal]] || [[word:bangalakal|bangalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bangalathatha|bangalathatha]] || [[word:bangalajaja|bangalajaja]] || [[word:bangalashasha|bangalashasha]] || [[word:bangalaka|bangalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bangalathan|bangalathan]] || [[word:bangalajan|bangalajan]] || [[word:bangalashan|bangalashan]] || [[word:bangalakan|bangalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bangalathaoro|bangalathaoro]] || [[word:bangalajaoro|bangalajaoro]] || [[word:bangalashaoro|bangalashaoro]] || [[word:bangalakaoro|bangalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
